openai-codex-npm.title: @openai/codex 0.128.0
openai-codex-npm.summaryText:
npm i -g @openai/codex
or brew install --cask codex

Codex CLI is a coding agent from OpenAI that runs locally on your computer.

claude-code-npm.title: @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2.1.128
claude-code-npm.summaryText: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.
